title: Create basic task
description: This example demonstrates how to create a task management table using the DocSpace JavaScript SDK.

title: File manager with task attachments
description: This example demonstrates how to integrate the DocSpace file selector into a task management interface.

title: Collaborative project workflow
description: This example shows how to build a freelance project workspace using DocSpace SDK.

title: DocSpace chat commands
description: This example shows how to integrate DocSpace SDK selectors into a chat interface.

title: Manage project folders
description: This example shows how to create a simple project tracker that interacts with DocSpace.

title: Structured room creation
description: This example demonstrates how to use the DocSpace JavaScript SDK to create a structured workspace for each new client.

title: Create files in rooms
description: This example demonstrates how to create tasks linked to rooms in DocSpace, and then create files inside those rooms using the JavaScript SDK.

title: Room selector
description: This example shows how to use the DocSpace Room Selector within a custom task creation dialog.

title: Two-factor authentication
description: This example demonstrates a two-step verification process using a phone number and 4-digit code before granting access to DocSpace via the SDK.
